content: Hey there! I'm Dana Moore, and I run my own wedding planning agency called 'Forever Yours Events' in San Diego. Just finished planning a beautiful beachfront wedding last weekend.
Hello Dana! That sounds wonderful. Beachfront weddings are always so romantic. How did the event go?
It went amazingly well! The couple loved everything. I'm actually taking a short break this week before diving into my next project - I'm developing an online course for aspiring wedding planners.
That's fantastic! An online course is a great way to share your expertise. What topics are you planning to cover?

Everything from vendor selection to timeline management. I've been in this business for 25 years now, so I've got plenty of insights to share. When I'm not working, I love knitting and surfing - keeps me balanced!
Those sound like perfect stress-relievers! Do you find time to surf often with your busy schedule?
I try to hit the waves at least twice a week, usually early mornings before the office gets busy. Last month I even took a surf trip to Costa Rica - absolutely incredible waves there!
Costa Rica is on my bucket list! How was the trip overall?
Amazing! Besides surfing, I did some travel blogging about the experience. I've been documenting my adventures for about five years now. It's a fun creative outlet.
That's impressive! Do you share your travel blog with clients or keep it separate from your wedding planning business?

I keep them separate, though some clients have found it and enjoy reading about my travels. Speaking of clients, I have a meeting in 20 minutes with a couple who want to book their 2025 wedding. Gotta run!
Good luck with the meeting, Dana! Sounds like you've got an exciting year ahead with both your business and your online course.
Thanks! I'm really excited about both. The course should launch by June if all goes well. Catch you later!
Looking forward to hearing about your progress. Take care and enjoy your client meeting!
Will do! Thanks for the chat.
Anytime, Dana. Have a great day!
